title: God’s Knights Close In
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows King Harald, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Usopp, Shanks, Unknown person #3 as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
scene: God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If Harald left the castle in that state...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The wake of the fierce battle at Quest Castle...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...He would have brought great calamity to the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had a taste of that hopeless future during the fight...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter how badly we wounded him, his body kept repairing itself.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: It's shocking...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to think something actually stopped him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you know this sacred treasure would be that powerful?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: JARUL???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, I actually knew nothing about it. All I know is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I get chills down my spine when I imagine what would've happened if Loxi hadn't been here today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: When I join the God's knights,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It'll be a new dawn for Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you have any wish, simply name it, and it will be within your reach.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've truly endured a miserable, squalid life until now, my poor child!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forget your former life on the surface!! The commoners down there don't even count as people!!

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: Shanks?!

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: Hey, shanks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Stop it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's a bad habit...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should never resent the Circum- stances of your birth.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Why did Harald have to die?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He was such a pure soul!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If only I had been faster...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This isn't your fault!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen shanks, you are here for a reason.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Everyone's life has some meaning to it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You just gotta hold on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is this what happens when you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...Love your country too much?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This sucks!!

summary: This part advances God’s Knights Tighten Their Grip through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
